Lamine Yamal is absolutely tearing it up in La Liga, leading the assist charts with a stunning 11 for Barcelona!
Barcelona's Lamine Yamal isn't just scoring; he's the assist king in La Liga, leading the pack with 11, ahead of Luis Milla (9) and Arda Güler (8)!

Forget the shiny modern forwards, who was the real Premier League scoring king of the early 2000s?

Thierry Henry? 4x PL Golden Boots, 175 goals, the Invincible. Pure flair, pace, and power. Could do it all.

Ruud van Nistelrooy? 95 PL goals in just 150 games. Unmatched penalty box instinct. Ruthless.

One was pure artistry, the other pure killer instinct. Who had the bigger impact?
